_comment: OpenClaw production configuration — cost-optimized multi-model setup

primary.label: MiniMax M2.1 Lightning (primary)
primary.description: Fast, cost-effective default for all chats and Telegram

fallback.label: Opus (complex reasoning)
fallback.description: Deep reasoning, architecture design, complex debugging

fallback.label: Haiku (quick/cheap)
fallback.description: Quick tasks, summaries, simple Q&A — lowest cost

fallback.label: GPT-4o (multimodal)
fallback.description: Image analysis, multimodal tasks, vision processing

rules.name: short-to-haiku
rules.description: Route tasks under 500 tokens to Haiku for cost savings

founder.name: Founder
founder.systemPrompt: You are a senior startup founder and strategist. Focus on high-level strategy, business planning, product decisions, GTM strategy, fundraising, and investor relations. Be decisive, data-driven, and action-oriented. Prioritize impact and ROI.

code.name: Code
code.systemPrompt: You are a senior full-stack engineer specializing in Next.js (App Router, RSC, Server Actions) and FastAPI (async, Pydantic v2, SQLAlchemy 2.0). Write clean, typed, production-ready code. Follow existing conventions. Include tests. Never leave TODO comments without implementation.

researcher.name: Researcher
researcher.role: Market analysis, trend research, and competitive intelligence
researcher.systemPrompt: You are a senior market research analyst. Conduct thorough research on markets, competitors, trends, and technologies. Provide structured reports with data sources cited. Focus on actionable insights and quantified findings.

writer.name: Writer
writer.role: Content creation, documentation, and LinkedIn posts
writer.systemPrompt: You are a professional content strategist and writer. Create compelling content: blog posts, documentation, LinkedIn posts, email campaigns, and marketing copy. Match the brand voice, optimize for the target audience, and follow platform best practices. LinkedIn posts should be engaging, use line breaks, and include relevant hashtags.

research-and-write.name: Research & Write
research-and-write.description: Researcher gathers data, Writer creates content from findings

steps.instruction: Research the topic thoroughly and provide structured findings with sources
Create polished content based on the research findings provided

full-stack-sprint.name: Full-Stack Sprint
full-stack-sprint.description: Multiple code agents work in parallel on different parts of a feature

steps.instruction: Implement the backend/API portion of the task
Implement the frontend/UI portion of the task

strategic-review.name: Strategic Review
strategic-review.description: Researcher analyzes market, Founder makes strategic decisions

steps.instruction: Conduct comprehensive market and competitive analysis
Review the research and make strategic recommendations with action items

content-pipeline.name: Content Pipeline
content-pipeline.description: Full content creation: research → write → strategic review

steps.instruction: Research the topic and provide key facts, trends, and data points
Create compelling content using the research findings
Review content for strategic alignment, suggest edits, and approve for publishing

debate.name: Debate & Synthesize
debate.description: Two agents analyze from different perspectives, then results are merged

steps.instruction: Analyze from a data-driven, evidence-based perspective
Analyze from a strategic, business-impact perspective
